field.name: unit_position_id
field.required: is_rfs == False and parent.has_tracking == 'serial' and parent.picking_code == 'incoming' and parent.use_existing_lots and parent.has_nrfs == 'have_nrfs'
field.column_invisible: parent.has_tracking != 'serial' or parent.picking_code != 'incoming' or parent.use_create_lots or parent.division != 'Unit' or parent.has_nrfs == 'no_nrfs'
